title: Why Hut 8 Stock Is in Focus After a $9.8 Billion AI Data Center Deal
text: HUT Stock Focus After Beacon Point Deal. Analysis of why Hut 8 stock gained investor attention following $9.8 billion AI data center lease announcement. Deal significance for company's revenue diversification. Shift from Bitcoin mining to contracted AI infrastructure. Long-term cash flow visibility from triple-net lease structure. Investment-grade tenant quality supporting stock valuation.
